Metadata.Changelog:
+ Patched detection - no more 10 minute crashes
+ Removed internal user interface temporarily
+ Using other Scheduler method temporarily
+ Added getcallbackvalue
+ Switched too Luau Drawing Library temporarily
+ Fixed WebSocket UNC error
For any errors report at discord.gg/getvoid

+ Updated too version-4b6315bf1f0a4dbb
+ Updated too Void Client 1.0.2 (BETA)
+ Fixed SEH showing Unknown Module
+ Switched back too C++ Drawing Library
+ Brought back Internal User Interface & Internal Notifications
+ Added getconnections, getconnection, firesignal, decompile
+ Bypassed Client Modification Detection
+ Added a new way to help debug crashes
For any errors report at discord.gg/getvoid

+ Updated too 0.723
+ Fixed getconnections to reach 100 sUNC
+ Added setfflag, getfflag
+ Kicia hook v3 Semi Fixed (Speaking to developers to fix)
+ Hoho hub Semi Fixed
+ Atlas BSS & Vexhub & Orion library supported

+ Added error redirection (Check internal user interface)
+ Remade WebSocket (Doesnt pass Myriad but will be fixed in future)
+ Fixed stability issue with Execution & Initialization
+ Added feature inside of settings to set key for toggling the internal user interface
For any errors report at discord.gg/getvoid

+ Updated too version-76173e47a79145c7
+ Updated Luau 0.723 -> 0.725

+ Remade getgc
+ Remade Closure Library
+ Remade File System Library
+ Fixed cloneref error on Myriad
+ Bedwars issue fixed (Please report if you still get this issue)
+ Improved optimization on yielding
+ Fixed yielding error redirection issue and yielding errors issue
+ Removed Internal User Interface
+ Added runonactor, getcommchannel, createcommchannel, isparallel
For any errors report at discord.gg/getvoid
